text: "Honestly, the thing I care most about is letting the people I talk to actually tell the story — I'm not interested in paraphrasing someone's experience when their own words are right there. I write narrative-driven, reported pieces, so structure matters a lot to me: I want readers to feel the human side of something *and* understand the bigger systemic picture, not just one or the other. And accessibility is non-negotiable for me — if a general reader can't follow it, I've failed, no matter how good the reporting is."
